necessityProof.blockerResolved: N5 code-health work is blocked until the active N1 renderer consolidation plan finishes enough renderer migration and creates room for later file-count reductions.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: Future Phase-B renderer folding and N5 file-splitting work consume the reduced renderer surface by merging fully standardized renderers into their owning service files without changing report output.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The v2114 verificationReportBuilder already expresses the archive verification markdown shape, so this version reuses it instead of adding another renderer helper or report chain.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The version stops after ten uniform archive verification renderers; section-array, loop-heavy, and helper renderers remain deferred until a batch can migrate them without special cases.

standardShape.documentedException: fresh-baseline-evidence keeps its original Route Catalog section between Source Report and Summary.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 12 javaMiniKvRouteCatalogCleanup archive verification focused tests --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Loaded real profiles, rebuilt the old array-join markdown model with renderEntries/renderList, and asserted equality with the migrated renderer output.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2090-renderer-consolidation-batch-2-v2119.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2119 only refactors Node markdown renderer implementation and consumes frozen local profile data; it does not require fresh Java or mini-kv evidence and does not change route contracts.
